label: 12 cams — baseline
note: black-fill training: player goes see-through on 114/120 frames

label: 12 cams — alpha-fix
note: random bg + matte supervision: opaque on 119/120 frames

label: 24 cams — baseline
note: doubling cameras barely helps opacity (100/120 frames still see-through)

label: 24 cams — alpha-fix
note: fix + cameras: sharpest and opaque — count buys sharpness, fix buys solidity

label: SHOW 4K-trained — 12 cams
note: 4K Studios Show Pair, native 3840x2160 supervision, alpha-fix on (default)

label: SHOW 1080p-trained — 12 cams
note: same frames/cams as the 4K arm, x2-downsampled supervision — the resolution A/B

label: SHOW 4K-trained — 24 cams
note: native 4K supervision, 24-cam nested ring, alpha-fix on

label: SHOW 1080p-trained — 24 cams
note: x2-downsampled supervision twin of the 24-cam 4K arm

label: SHOW 4K — 24 cams — TUNED densifier
note: densify threshold /4 (resolution-scaled): +1.1 dB over the 1080p twin on the matched grid — 2.5M splats

label: SHOW 1080p — 24 cams — AGGRESSIVE densifier
note: the attribution control: matches tuned-4K PSNR (26.86) at BETTER LPIPS (0.124) — capacity, not resolution

label: SHOW 1080p — 12 cams — AGGRESSIVE densifier
note: 12 cams + capacity beats fixed-recipe 24 cams (26.86 vs 26.69 person-only)

label: SHOW 4K-trained — ALL 92 cams
note: the full arc at native 4K — count saturates: no better than 24 cams

label: SHOW 1080p-trained — ALL 92 cams
note: 92-cam 1080p twin — statistically tied with the 24-cam cell
